# daytona_organization_roles (Data Source)

Lists Daytona organization roles visible to the configured credentials.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_roles" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to read.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned Daytona objects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Object ID.
- `name` (String) Object name.
- `state` (String) Object state, when applicable.
